svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux x86_64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/29.6.1 Chrome/142.0.7444.265 Electron/39.8.0 Safari/537.36" version="29.6.1"> <diagram id="o4HhWIm9J8gkuMRr3hfi" name="pageWithNumber"> <mxGraphModel dx="-379" dy="-283" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="720" pageHeight="1080" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="n_entry" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#000000;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;" value="fetchPage(url)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="220" x="250" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n_d1" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#fff9c4;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="llms.txt domain?" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="178" x="271" y="94" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n_fp1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Probe /llms-full.txt
extract matching section
→ return" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="180" x="510" y="94" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n_d2" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#fff9c4;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="github.com?" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="178" x="271" y="194" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n_fp2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="GitHub API /
raw.githubusercontent.com
→ return" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="180" x="510" y="194" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n_d3" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#fff9c4;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value=".pdf URL?" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="178" x="271" y="294" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n_robots" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;" value="robots.txt pre-check (tiers 1–3)
disallowed → RobotsDisallowedError (cached 24h)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="290" x="215" y="394" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n_t1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="Tier 1 — Firecrawl ($FIRECRAWL_URL)
page markdown + HTML" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="290" x="215" y="474" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n_t2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#97c08e;strokeColor=#5a9154;" value="Tier 2 — Crawl4AI ($CRAWL4AI_URL, optional)
raw_markdown or fit_markdown" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="290" x="215" y="564" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n_t3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="Tier 3 — Raw HTTP + Readability
fallback: raw HTML slice (non-article pages)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="290" x="215" y="654" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n_t4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" value="Tier 4 — Wayback Machine CDX API
archived page markdown, [Archived] prefix
(opt-in: WAYBACK_ENABLED=true)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="290" x="215" y="744" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n_pe" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;" value="Post-extraction (applies to result from any tier)
JSON-LD Article (Schema.org) + title cascade
og:title → twitter:title → <title> → h1 → URL" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="290" x="215" y="854" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n_out" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#e8e8e8;strokeColor=#333333;fontStyle=1;" value="Valkey fetch:* (24h TTL, 8k chars)
→ { title, url, text }" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="290" x="215" y="964" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n_note1" parent="1" style="text;whiteSpace=wrap;align=left;fontSize=9;fontColor=#888888;" value="* Per-domain tier skip:
success rate <30% (≥10 tries)
or tier_skip override" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="175" x="20" y="484" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n_note2" parent="1" style="text;whiteSpace=wrap;align=left;fontSize=9;fontColor=#555555;fontStyle=2;" value="On success → skip
remaining tiers,
go to post-extraction" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="175" x="20" y="754" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="n_entry" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="n_d1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="n_d1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitPerimeter=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryPerimeter=0;" target="n_fp1" value="yes"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="n_d1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitPerimeter=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryPerimeter=0;" target="n_d2" value="no"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4" edge="1" parent="1" source="n_d2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitPerimeter=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryPerimeter=0;" target="n_fp2" value="yes"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e5" edge="1" parent="1" source="n_d2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitPerimeter=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryPerimeter=0;" target="n_d3" value="no"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e6" edge="1" parent="1" source="n_d3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitPerimeter=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryPerimeter=0;" target="n_robots" value="no"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e7" edge="1" parent="1" source="n_d3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;dashed=1;strokeColor=#999999;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitPerimeter=0;entryX=1;entryY=0.5;entryPerimeter=0;" target="n_t2" value="yes (.pdf) — skip tier 1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="620" y="329" /> <mxPoint x="620" y="594" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e8" edge="1" parent="1" source="n_robots" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="n_t1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e9" edge="1" parent="1" source="n_t1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="n_t2" value="empty / error"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e10" edge="1" parent="1" source="n_t2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="n_t3" value="empty / error"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e11" edge="1" parent="1" source="n_t3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="n_t4" value="empty / error"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e12" edge="1" parent="1" source="n_t4" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="n_pe"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e13" edge="1" parent="1" source="n_pe" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="n_out"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
